notes: Current primary paper-trade rule-component basket for Phase 7; target-card availability still comes from daily preflight.
This keeps the paper path aligned with current operational reality: BEL is dormant, so OP + CD are paper-active rule components rather than a claim that today's card is active.
Use this as the primary paper baseline when you want the strongest current portfolio-level holdout result without carrying the dormant BEL leg.
No unsupported track aliasing is applied. BAQ is not treated as BEL.

rules.plain_english: Oaklawn Park, race 7+, 11-12 runners, favorite-second gap at least 5%, play Key-1-with-7.
Churchill Downs, 10-11 runners, favorite-second gap at least 15%, play Key-1-with-8.
